login.brandSubtitle: We're here to help. You're not alone.
login.subtitle: Please login to your account
login.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.

register.brandSubtitle: Join us to get the support you need.
register.subtitle: Fill in the details to register
register.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address.
register.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters.

dashboard.studentSubtitle: Track your support requests and get help from the support team.
dashboard.supportSubtitle: Monitor support requests and manage student issues.
dashboard.urgentNote: These requests should be reviewed as soon as possible.
dashboard.recentStudentSubtitle: Your most recently updated support requests.
dashboard.recentSupportSubtitle: The latest support requests that require review.
dashboard.emptyStudentDesc: Create your first support ticket to get help.
dashboard.emptySupportDesc: New support requests will appear here.

tickets.studentSubtitle: View, track and continue your support conversations.
tickets.emptyStudentDesc: You have not submitted any support requests yet.
tickets.supportSubtitle: Search, filter and manage all support requests submitted by students.
tickets.searchAndFiltersSubtitle: Find tickets by title, student, category or ticket number.
tickets.emptyMatchDesc: Try changing the search term or clearing the selected filters.

ticketDetails.notFoundDesc: The requested support ticket does not exist.
ticketDetails.conversationSupportSubtitle: View updates and reply directly to the support team.
ticketDetails.conversationStudentSubtitle: Review previous messages and send a reply.
ticketDetails.noMessagesDesc: No messages have been added to this ticket yet.
ticketDetails.replyToSupportPlaceholder: Write your reply to the support team...
ticketDetails.replyToStudentPlaceholder: Write your response to the student...
ticketDetails.saveSuccess: Ticket status and priority were updated successfully.
ticketDetails.changesVisibleNote: Changes are immediately visible to the student.

createTicket.label: New Support Request
createTicket.title: Create a Ticket
createTicket.subtitle: Provide clear details so the support team can help you quickly.
createTicket.tipsIntro: A clear request helps the support team understand and solve the problem more quickly.
createTicket.tip1: Use a short and specific title.
createTicket.tip3: Mention any steps you already tried.
createTicket.tip4: Choose Urgent only when immediate help is needed.

form.title: Ticket Title
form.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe what happened, when the problem started, and what you already tried...

deleteModal.title: Delete this ticket?
deleteModal.description: This will permanently remove "{title}" and all its messages. This action cannot be undone.

validation.titleMin: The title must contain at least {min} characters.
validation.descMin: The description must contain at least {min} characters.
validation.replyMin: The reply must contain at least {min} characters.
